title: SDD Triage Manifest
description: Schema for the triage manifest output produced by triage-documents.sh. Defines the structure of .triage-manifest.json files stored in ticket planning directories.

ticket_description.description: The ticket description text used for document triage

overrides.description: List of override flags applied during triage (e.g., +accessibility, -runbook)

documents.description: List of documents evaluated during triage with their disposition

documentEntry.description: A single document triage result with its action and reason

action.description: Triage action: generate (include in planning) or skip (exclude)

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the triage decision
